title: CHIRPS Dekadal (legacy-compatible view)
description: Illustrative ONLY. Shows the DEPRECATED transitional form in which a dimension-level `href` is emitted alongside `provider.href` so that legacy STAC clients that cannot follow OGC Records `links[]` can still page through members. New implementations SHOULD omit the outer `href` and expose only `provider.href`; clients then follow `rel="items"` on the provider collection response. See dekadal.json for the recommended form.
